child_or_private_fold_queue.why_not_standalone: Publication wrappers are authority/status checks, not reconstruction roots.
Oracle policy rows need proof policy, anti-corruption boundary, and behavior-learning loop.
The formal-prover tail is strong only as a lab evaluation organ with receipts, split policy, premise boundary, and repair loop.
Prediction/oracle rows need synthetic domain fixtures and should not become signal products.
Raw-seed alchemy rows depend on private voice and source-index membranes.
Reaction rows need governor mode, barrier, claim, finalizer, and external-boundary policy.
Market rows are evidence-fixture material, not domain prediction products.
Entry and egress behavior rows are governance gates inside navigation and agent-observability organs.
The response-attention rows borrow private operator bridge memory, sanitized HUD action receipts, attention leases, and sidecar lifecycle gates.

intentional_router_overlaps.resolution: primary route is navigation_hologram_route_plane; carry entry_agent_behavior_governance_suborgan when the task is about agent behavior or compliance.
primary route is navigation_hologram_route_plane; carry entry_agent_behavior_governance_suborgan when the task is about route compliance, lease mode, or behavioral feedback.

do_not_do: do not append mined rows to fix routing gaps
do not use current public microcosm leaves as authority
do not let a routed pattern id bypass organ readiness gates
next_type_a_pass.preferred_artifact_or_tool: kernel/context-pack or selector admission hook that opens tools/meta/factory/check_extracted_pattern_route_readiness.py and state/microcosm_portfolio/extracted_pattern_route_readiness_validation_report.json
next_type_a_pass.recommended_task: Wire the readiness checker into the future reconstruction selector or route admission surface so organ selection cannot proceed on stale route overlays.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Pattern binding contract plus executable doctrine grammar.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Standard-shaped rows become paperwork when validator, source lineage, and negative cases are omitted.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Proof rows, diagnostics, validators, and formal-evidence witnesses as one evidence spine.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Proof witnesses alone look strong but cannot police claims without rejection behavior and source boundaries.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Navigation route plane plus projection/omission/affordance mechanics.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: A navigation projection without source-coupled builder and omission receipts becomes a static contents page.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Task Ledger, Work Ledger, claim, commit, status, and closeout metabolism.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Boards, commit lanes, or status rows alone do not prove work survival under concurrency.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Agent route compliance, session attribution, principle lens, and behavior-changing observability.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Telemetry without a route repair path is observation, not self-improvement.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Provider, prompt, feed, memory, and annex inputs crossing explicit boundaries.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: External rows become adoption or signal products when the anti-corruption boundary is omitted.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Bridge runtime, phase continuity, autonomous reaction, and continuation receipts.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Automation rows without governor and closeout barriers hide the runtime risk.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: Raw-seed-to-doctrine metabolism as a synthetic self-improvement fixture.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Real raw seed, memory, and voice archaeology are private macro substrate, not portable leaves.

organ_readiness.natural_leaf_composition: A typed cockpit/view specimen, not the live cockpit.
organ_readiness.weak_if_misread: Live UI state exposes private control-plane context and lacks portability.

readiness_gate_order.question: Does the selector cite the current extracted ledger count and hash?

readiness_gate_order.evidence: 118 hard no-standalone ids and zero standalone pattern leaf candidates
readiness_gate_order.question: Is the selected unit an organ bundle rather than an isolated pattern row?

readiness_gate_order.evidence: root_binding_and_executable_grammar, proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine, navigation_hologram_route_plane, and mission_transaction_work_spine are first-class readiness gates
readiness_gate_order.question: Does the organ carry grammar, proof, route, and work substrate before dependent runtime claims?

readiness_gate_order.evidence: extracted_pattern_organ_fixture_specs.json carries fixture contracts for every readiness row
readiness_gate_order.question: Does the organ have synthetic inputs, expected artifacts, negative cases, anti-claims, and validator or check routes?

readiness_gate_order.evidence: private_fixture_only specs are explicitly blocked from standalone selection until synthetic corpus, synthetic provider packets, or typed-state fixtures exist
readiness_gate_order.question: Can live/private/raw/provider/cockpit state be replaced by synthetic fixtures?
readiness_gate_order.required_for: private_fixture_only, external_boundary, voice, market, cockpit, and provider-adjacent organs

readiness_gate_order.evidence: proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine is a prerequisite for every selectable runtime organ
readiness_gate_order.question: Does the organ prove both acceptance and rejection behavior?
readiness_gate_order.required_for: all claims with proof, validation, routing, or agent behavior semantics

readiness_gate_order.evidence: child_suborgan_fold, private_fixture_only, reframe_or_child_fold, and deferred_child_suborgan classes
readiness_gate_order.question: Is the row really a live control surface, release wrapper, private fixture, or local status projection?
readiness_gate_order.required_for: publication, cockpit, raw-seed, provider, market, and formal-lab child material

blocked_if_missing: formal prover evaluation rows become benchmark fragments without proof policy and transaction receipts
publication wrappers become release framing without authority gates
provider/feed rows become external signal products without anti-corruption boundaries
cockpit rows become screenshots of private live state
raw-seed rows expose private voice instead of synthetic voice-to-doctrine metabolism
root_substrate_lock.why: Rows below this substrate can look impressive because they borrow hidden infrastructure. The sequence forces source lineage, executable grammar, proof boundaries, route discoverability, and work/status continuity to become explicit before leaf selection.

routing_improvement.operational_rule: No pattern row becomes a future microcosm leaf by itself. A row can only open an organ route; the organ must pass prerequisite, fixture, proof, private-boundary, and anti-claim gates before selection.
routing_improvement.previous_layer: organ-first route cards plus row-first reverse router
routing_improvement.problem_closed: A future agent could still start from a routed row and mistake route existence for leaf eligibility. This audit separates routable, selectable-as-organ, child-fold, private-fixture-only, and macro-only states.

selector_must_reject: publication wrappers without proof and authority gates
formal lab rows without split policy and repair receipts
cockpit rows without typed synthetic state and render checks

structurally_weak_family_readiness.weakness: Release and go/no-go wrappers look decisive but borrow proof, external-boundary, and mission-transaction authority.

structurally_weak_family_readiness.safe_route: voice_to_doctrine_self_improvement_loop with raw_seed_alchemy_review_suborgan as private fixture
structurally_weak_family_readiness.weakness: High-signal private voice and memory mechanics cannot travel without a synthetic voice corpus and source-index membrane.
Provider, prompt, feed, and memory rows are strong only with reducer, quarantine, evaluator, and authority ceiling.
The lab rows are over-atomized around benchmark apparatus unless folded into proof, external boundary, bridge, mission, and observability organs.
Domain rows can masquerade as prediction products; they should be evidence-policy fixtures.
Live cockpit rows are private macro control surfaces until converted to typed synthetic state and render/capture checks.
Individual landing/status rows are over-atomized; select the mission transaction organ, not a single finalizer or board.

structurally_weak_family_readiness.safe_route: standard_type and reference-capsule rows fold into root_binding_and_executable_grammar; raw-seed assimilation and maintenance rows fold into voice_to_doctrine_self_improvement_loop/raw_seed_alchemy_review_suborgan; provider worker capsules fold into external_boundary_anti_corruption_runtime; operator bridge, thread memory, mission-status, and handoff linkage rows fold into agent_route_observability_runtime/external_boundary; Type B handoff shuttles fold into bridge continuity; world-model drift and authority-chain handles fold into typed_view_contract_specimen; lesson candidates remain advisory under voice/self-improvement.
structurally_weak_family_readiness.weakness: Newly mined concrete substrate rows look leaf-ready because they cite code, tests, or paper modules, but each borrows an existing root, raw-seed, external-boundary, observability, typed-view, or bridge-continuity organ.

structurally_weak_family_readiness.safe_route: operator_response_attention_human_loop_compound and its component rows fold into operator_response_attention_suborgan under agent_route_observability_runtime, external_boundary_anti_corruption_runtime, and bridge_phase_continuity_runtime
structurally_weak_family_readiness.weakness: The rows cite strong code/test evidence but share hidden private operator bridge runtime and should not split into browser-response, HUD-action, sidecar, or approval-inbox standalone leaves.
